package.title: Wayanad Adventure — Chembra, Edakkal & Kuruva Island

highlights.text: Chembra Peak trek to the iconic heart-shaped Hridayasaras lake
Edakkal Caves Neolithic petroglyphs and Muthanga Wildlife 4x4 jeep safari
900 Kandi glass bridge canopy walk and Kuruva Island bamboo rafting
Banasura Sagar Dam speed boating — India's largest earth dam
Specialized adventure guides, skip-the-line trek passes, and campfire evenings
Private Innova Crysta SUV with TRAGUIN 24/7 adventure concierge

itinerary.title: Wayanad Adventure — Chembra, Edakkal & Kuruva Island
itinerary.tagline: Wild Wayanad — Adventure Meets Premium Eco-Luxury
itinerary.overview: TRAGUIN's Wayanad Adventure Escape blends high-octane thrill with pristine nature — Chembra Peak trekking, prehistoric Edakkal Caves, Muthanga jeep safari, 900 Kandi glass bridge, and Kuruva bamboo rafting wrapped in handpicked premium eco-resort comfort.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-010 | Wayanad Adventure Kerala | TRAGUIN Chembra Edakkal Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 04 Nights / 05 Days Wayanad adventure package (KL-010) covering Chembra Peak, Edakkal Caves, Banasura Dam, 900 Kandi, and Kuruva Island with premium eco-resorts.

days.title: Calicut to Wayanad — Gateway to Misty Hills
days.description: Arrive at Calicut Airport or Railway Station where your TRAGUIN chauffeured vehicle welcomes you. Wind upward through the legendary Lakkidi Ghat Pass with 9 hairpin curves, pause at Lakkidi View Point, and check into your luxury eco-resort in Vythiri nestled in dense rainforests.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lakkidi Ghat Pass, Lakkidi View Point, Ficus Tree (Chain Tree) Legend Site
Evening Experience: Private indoor candle-lit ambient tea tasting session
Optional Activities: Premium Ayurvedic spa rejuvenation therapy at the resort
Overnight Stay: Vythiri / Kalpetta (Handpicked Luxury Eco-Resort)

days.title: Chembra Peak & Banasura Dam — Heart-Shaped Lake
days.description: Rise early for an exhilarating Chembra Peak trek with a certified local tracker through tea estates and shola forests to the heart-shaped Hridayasaras lake. After lunch, visit Banasura Sagar Dam — India's largest earth dam — with speed boating across the reservoir.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chembra Peak Trekking, Heart-Shaped Lake, Banasura Sagar Dam, Karlad Lake
Evening Experience: Zipline over water bodies catching golden sunset views
Optional Activities: High-speed zip-lining and rock climbing at Karlad Lake adventure hub
Overnight Stay: Vythiri / Kalpetta (Handpicked Luxury Eco-Resort)

days.title: Edakkal Caves & Muthanga Jeep Safari
days.description: Trek to Edakkal Caves on Ambukuthi Mala to see Neolithic petroglyphs dating back over 8,000 years. Explore Sulthan Bathery heritage, then embark on an exclusive 4x4 open jeep safari into Muthanga Wildlife Sanctuary.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Edakkal Caves, Sulthan Bathery Jain Temple, Muthanga Wildlife Sanctuary Zone
Evening Experience: Traditional live multi-course dinner accompanied by a light campfire setting
Optional Activities: Tribal archery interaction and local bamboo crafts workshop
Overnight Stay: Sulthan Bathery (Premium Boutique Resort)

days.title: 900 Kandi & Kuruva Island — Canopy Walk & Bamboo Rafting
days.description: Board a rugged off-road vehicle to 900 Kandi eco-park and walk the thrilling glass bridge suspended above the jungle canopy. Continue to Kuruvadweep for traditional hand-woven bamboo rafting on the Kabini River, with optional Soochipara Waterfalls.
activities: Sightseeing Included: 900 Kandi Eco-Park, Glass Bridge Walkway, Kuruvadweep Bamboo Rafting, Soochipara Waterfalls
Evening Experience: Bespoke interactive session with a professional naturalist on Western Ghats biodiversity
Optional Activities: River trekking and wild stream bathing under expert safety supervision
Overnight Stay: Sulthan Bathery (Premium Boutique Resort)

days.title: Wayanad to Calicut — Departure
days.description: Relish an elite breakfast before check-out. Cruise back toward Calicut with stops at Pookode Lake and local spice plantations for organic cardamom, vanilla pods, chocolates, and Malabar tea leaves.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Pookode Lake (en-route boating), Local Spice and Tea Plantations
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance at Calicut Airport or Railway Station
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
04 nights premium eco-resort accommodation across Vythiri/Kalpetta and Sulthan Bathery
Complimentary 4x4 jeep safari passes and Kuruva Island bamboo rafting entry vouchers
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
